name: super-test
description: MiMo-led module-level exploratory E2E bug-harvesting. OpenCode/MiMoCode is the DRIVER with a configurable executor model: it sweeps a module with agent-browser logging bug-catalog/coverage-map/bypass-log/blocked-flows, then file-hands-off to Opus 4.8 (max effort) for BATCH cluster-RCA + repair batches, Codex reviews risky batches, MiMo implements the approved plan, then targeted + module-sweep retest. Sibling of progressive-test (harvest-first/batch-repair, NOT fix-first). Claude/Opus is a called specialist, never the orchestrator.
status: M1: scaffold + schemas + harvest sweep. M2: opus batch-rca + codex gate. M3: repair + 2-stage retest. UNPROVEN e2e — first real run is the owner gate.
